name: Zucchini Corn Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fresh or canned whole corn
About one Tbsp butter or Margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together cornmeal, flour, baking soda, cumin, salt and pepper.
2. Using large holes on a shredder, shred zucchini to make 3/4 cup (packed). Squeeze with your hands to extract excess moisture.
3. In a medium-size bowl, mix egg, buttermilk, oil, zucchini, corn and green onion. Stir until evenly moistened.
4. Heat a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat. Grease lightly with butter.
5. Spoon about 2 tablespoons batter onto the skillet for each cake, spreading batter to make 3-inch cakes.
6. Cook until tiny bubbles form in the centers and edges of cakes appear dry; turn and cook other sides until browned and cakes puff slightly.
7. Serve 2 or 3 cakes per person. Top each serving with sour cream as desired.
